summary: The frontend is functional and production-capable for the current workspace flow. However, it lacks the dedicated dashboard page structure, public website sub-routes, and animation libraries needed for the full Prompt 3 overhaul.

routes.notes: Full landing page with Nav, Hero, Features (anchor), Pipeline (anchor), CTA, Footer
Serves as dashboard home + new build form

missing_routes.notes: Content exists as #features anchor on Landing — not a dedicated route
Content exists as #pipeline anchor on Landing — not a dedicated route
Alias needed for /app; current URL is /app which is not intuitive
Alias for /app; no dedicated projects list page separate from dashboard
Media library is a dialog, not a page/route
Settings is a dialog, not a dedicated page/route

dashboard_structure.description: The dashboard is a single /app page (ProjectList.jsx, 588 lines) that combines dashboard home, new build form, project list, and repo import. There are no dedicated sub-pages for Dashboard Home, New Build, Repo Workbench, Media Library, or Settings.
what_exists: New build form (prompt, mode, quality tier, media choice, advanced options)
what_is_missing: Dedicated Dashboard Home page with analytics/stats
Dedicated Repo Workbench page (currently a panel inside Workspace)
Dedicated Projects page (separate from dashboard home)

workspace_flow.description: Workspace.jsx (766 lines) is comprehensive: agent timeline, chat, file tree, code viewer, live preview, validation panel, repo workbench, settings dialog, PR dialog, media library, build plan banner, advisor panel.
implemented: Agent timeline with real-time WebSocket events
gaps: Preview iframe auth token is in URL (security concern, noted as TODO)
No keyboard shortcuts for common actions
No diff view for file changes between iterations

preview_embedding.security_concern: Auth token passed as URL query param — visible in browser history and server logs

design_token_readiness.tailwind_tokens: amk-base, amk-surface, amk-panel, amk-fg, amk-fg2, amk-fg3, amk-line, amk-accent (#00E676)
design_token_readiness.typography: JetBrains Mono (mono), Inter/IBM Plex Sans (sans), Space Grotesk (display)
design_token_readiness.animations: fade-up, float, accordion-up/down (CSS only, via tailwindcss-animate)

responsive_state.workspace: desktop-optimized — multiple panels would need responsive rework for mobile

landing_page.quality: good — full sections, animations, feature chips, pipeline diagram

features_page.quality: features section exists on Landing as #features anchor, not a dedicated /features route

pipeline_page.quality: pipeline section exists on Landing as #pipeline anchor, not a dedicated /pipeline route

access_page.quality: no waitlist, request-access, or early-access page

login_page.quality: clean login form with auth-context integration

component_reuse_opportunities: ScoreBar in ValidationPanel could be a shared design token component
Modal pattern repeated across SettingsDialog, PRDialog, MediaLibraryDialog, RepoCollisionModal — could be unified
Panel header pattern (border-b, font-mono, icon) repeated across multiple components

frontend_blockers.description: No sidebar navigation — dashboard is a single page with no persistent nav structure. Prompt 3 requires Dashboard Home / New Build / Workspace / Repo Workbench / Projects / Media Library / Settings as distinct navigable sections.
frontend_blockers.fix: Add sidebar nav, convert dialogs to pages, restructure /app routing

frontend_blockers.description: Framer Motion not installed in frontend/package.json. Prompt 3 requires rich page transitions and micro-animations.
No dedicated /features, /pipeline, /access routes. These exist only as anchors on the Landing page.
frontend_blockers.fix: Create dedicated pages or React Router routes for each public website section

frontend_blockers.description: Preview iframe auth token exposed in URL query parameter.
frontend_blockers.fix: Implement short-lived preview tokens via dedicated endpoint

frontend_blockers.description: Workspace is desktop-only — not suitable for mobile use.
